title: Lead SEO Specialist at FreshToHome Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at FreshToHome Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome Capital India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome Capital India:
FreshToHome Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
